method not specified."}]},{"code":"151570","display":"MDC_AWAY_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: transthoracic impedance variations."}]},{"code":"151594","display":"MDC_CO2_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: carbon dioxide measurement."}]},{"code":"151602","display":"MDC_PRESS_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: non-airway pressure measurement, e.g. central venous blood pressure (CVP)."}]},{"code":"151650","display":"MDC_ACOUSTIC_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: acoustic."}]},{"code":"151658","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PLETH_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: SpO2 plethysmography."}]},{"code":"8410992","display":"MDC_SABTE_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Value of respiration rate. [measured by sleep apnoea breathing therapy equipment]"}]},{"code":"149514","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery."}]},{"code":"149522","display":"MDC_BLD_PULS_RATE_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured invasively."}]},{"code":"149546","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE_NON_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured non-invasively."}]},{"code":"149530","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse as obtained by pulse oximetry."}]},{"code":"147842","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of cardiac beats (ECG)."}]},{"code":"8410590","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE_INSTANT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Instantaneous heart rate."}]},{"code":"149554","display":"MDC_TTHOR_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from the variation of transthoracic impedance."}]},{"code":"149562","display":"MDC_PALPATION_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from an artery that is close to the surface and a pulse can be felt."}]},{"code":"8454258","display":"MDC_HF_HR","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"This is an object representing the heart rate over a period of time. [Exercise / fitness equipment]"}]},{"code":"150324","display":"MDC_SAT_O2_ART","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Arterial oxygen saturation. [no method]"}]},{"code":"150456","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_SAT_O2","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Oxygen saturation. [using pulse oximetry]"}]},{"code":"150364","display":"MDC_TEMP_BODY","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Body temperature. [unspecified]"}]},{"code":"150368","display":"MDC_TEMP_CORE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Core temperature."}]},{"code":"150388","display":"MDC_TEMP_SKIN","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Skin temperature."}]},{"code":"150392","display":"MDC_TEMP_TYMP","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Tympanic temperature."}]},{"code":"188420","display":"MDC_TEMP_RECT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rectal temperature."}]},{"code":"188424","display":"MDC_TEMP_ORAL","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Oral temperature."}]},{"code":"188428","display":"MDC_TEMP_EAR","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Ear temperature."}]},{"code":"188452","display":"MDC_TEMP_AXILLA","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Axillary (armpit) temperature."}]},{"code":"188456","display":"MDC_TEMP_GIT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Gastro-intestinal tract temperature."}]},{"code":"188740","display":"MDC_LEN_BODY_ACTUAL","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"The actual height of the patient."}]},{"code":"153856","display":"MDC_CIRCUM_HEAD","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Circumference of the head."}]},{"code":"188736","display":"MDC_MASS_BODY_ACTUAL","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"The measurement of the mass of patient."}]},{"code":"188752","display":"MDC_RATIO_MASS_BODY_LEN_SQ","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"The individual's body weight, in kilograms, divided by the square of height, in of the blood, obtained noninvasively."}]},{"code":"150021","display":"MDC_PRESS_BLD_NONINV_SYS","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Pressure of the blood, obtained noninvasively, at the systolic of the blood, obtained noninvasively, at the diastolic of the blood, obtained noninvasively, as computed by averaging on one cycle."}]}]}]}}}]}

"},"url":"http://hl7.dk/fhir/core/ValueSet/dk-core-IEEEBasicObservation","version":"3.3.0","name":"IEEEBasicObservation","title":"Dk Core IEEE Basic Observation","status":"draft","experimental":false,"date":"2024-06-27T10:47:07+00:00","publisher":"HL7 Denmark","contact":[{"name":"HL7 Denmark","telecom":[{"system":"url","value":"http://www.hl7.dk"},{"system":"email","value":"jenskristianvilladsen@gmail.com"}]}],"description":"IEEE MDC codes for Basic Observations usable in Denmark","jurisdiction":[{"coding":[{"system":"urn:iso:std:iso:3166","code":"DK","display":"Denmark"}]}],"purpose":"### Purpose of this ValueSet\nThis ValueSet comprises the most common IEEE MDC codes used to represent observations\nthat are considered \"basic\" by this profile. This ValueSet is **not** meant to be exhaustive!\n\nThe origin of an MDC code is usually the equipment used to perform the measurement,\nand often the code carries supplemental information about how (or where on the body)\nthe observation was performed.","copyright":"IEEE","compose":{"include":[{"system":"urn:iso:std:iso:11073:10101","concept":[{"code":"151562","display":"MDC_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method not specified."}]},{"code":"151570","display":"MDC_AWAY_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: direct airway flow measurement."}]},{"code":"151578","display":"MDC_TTHOR_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: transthoracic impedance variations."}]},{"code":"151594","display":"MDC_CO2_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: carbon dioxide measurement."}]},{"code":"151602","display":"MDC_PRESS_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: non-airway pressure measurement, e.g. central venous blood pressure (CVP)."}]},{"code":"151650","display":"MDC_ACOUSTIC_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: acoustic."}]},{"code":"151658","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PLETH_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: SpO2 plethysmography."}]},{"code":"8410992","display":"MDC_SABTE_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Value of respiration rate. [measured by sleep apnoea breathing therapy equipment]"}]},{"code":"149514","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery."}]},{"code":"149522","display":"MDC_BLD_PULS_RATE_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured of blood pulse in an artery, measured non-invasively."}]},{"code":"149530","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse as obtained by pulse oximetry."}]},{"code":"147842","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of cardiac beats (ECG)."}]},{"code":"8410590","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE_INSTANT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Instantaneous rate."}]},{"code":"149554","display":"MDC_TTHOR_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from the variation of transthoracic impedance."}]},{"code":"149562","display":"MDC_PALPATION_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from an artery that is close to the surface and a pulse can be is an object representing the heart rate over a period of time. [measured by sleep apnoea breathing therapy equipment]"}]},{"code":"149514","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery."}]},{"code":"149522","display":"MDC_BLD_PULS_RATE_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured of blood pulse in an artery, measured non-invasively."}]},{"code":"149530","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse as obtained by pulse oximetry."}]},{"code":"147842","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of cardiac beats (ECG)."}]},{"code":"8410590","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE_INSTANT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Instantaneous heart rate."}]},{"code":"149554","display":"MDC_TTHOR_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from the variation of transthoracic impedance."}]},{"code":"149562","display":"MDC_PALPATION_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from an artery that is close to the surface and a pulse can be is an object representing the heart rate over a period of time. of the blood, obtained noninvasively, as computed by averaging on one cycle."}]}]}]}}}]}

!-- Narrative removed -->
"},"url":"http://hl7.dk/fhir/core/ValueSet/dk-core-IEEEBasicObservation","version":"3.3.0","name":"IEEEBasicObservation","title":"Dk Core IEEE Basic Observation","status":"draft","experimental":false,"date":"2024-06-27T10:47:07+00:00","publisher":"HL7 Denmark","contact":[{"name":"HL7 Denmark","telecom":[{"system":"url","value":"http://www.hl7.dk"},{"system":"email","value":"jenskristianvilladsen@gmail.com"}]}],"description":"IEEE MDC codes for Basic Observations usable in Denmark","jurisdiction":[{"coding":[{"system":"urn:iso:std:iso:3166","code":"DK","display":"Denmark"}]}],"purpose":"### Purpose of this ValueSet\nThis ValueSet comprises the most common IEEE MDC codes used to represent observations\nthat are considered \"basic\" by this profile. This ValueSet is **not** meant to be exhaustive!\n\nThe origin of an MDC code is usually the equipment used to perform the measurement,\nand often the code carries supplemental information about how (or where on the body)\nthe observation was performed.","copyright":"IEEE","compose":{"include":[{"system":"urn:iso:std:iso:11073:10101","concept":[{"code":"151562","display":"MDC_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method not specified."}]},{"code":"151570","display":"MDC_AWAY_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: direct airway flow measurement."}]},{"code":"151578","display":"MDC_TTHOR_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: transthoracic impedance variations."}]},{"code":"151594","display":"MDC_CO2_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: carbon dioxide measurement."}]},{"code":"151602","display":"MDC_PRESS_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: non-airway pressure measurement, e.g. central venous blood pressure (CVP)."}]},{"code":"151650","display":"MDC_ACOUSTIC_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: acoustic."}]},{"code":"151658","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PLETH_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of breathing; method: SpO2 plethysmography."}]},{"code":"8410992","display":"MDC_SABTE_RESP_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Value of respiration rate. [measured by sleep apnoea breathing therapy equipment]"}]},{"code":"149514","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery."}]},{"code":"149522","display":"MDC_BLD_PULS_RATE_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured invasively."}]},{"code":"149546","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE_NON_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery, measured non-invasively."}]},{"code":"149530","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse as obtained by pulse oximetry."}]},{"code":"147842","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of cardiac beats (ECG)."}]},{"code":"8410590","display":"MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE_INSTANT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Instantaneous heart rate."}]},{"code":"149554","display":"MDC_TTHOR_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from the variation of transthoracic impedance."}]},{"code":"149562","display":"MDC_PALPATION_HEART_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Heart rate obtained from an artery that is close to the surface and a pulse can be felt."}]},{"code":"8454258","display":"MDC_HF_HR","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"This is an object representing the heart rate over a period of time. [Exercise / fitness equipment]"}]},{"code":"150324","display":"MDC_SAT_O2_ART","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Arterial oxygen saturation. [no method]"}]},{"code":"150456","display":"MDC_PULS_OXIM_SAT_O2","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Oxygen saturation. [using pulse oximetry]"}]},{"code":"150364","display":"MDC_TEMP_BODY","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Body temperature. [unspecified]"}]},{"code":"150368","display":"MDC_TEMP_CORE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Core temperature."}]},{"code":"150388","display":"MDC_TEMP_SKIN","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Skin temperature."}]},{"code":"150392","display":"MDC_TEMP_TYMP","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Tympanic temperature."}]},{"code":"188420","display":"MDC_TEMP_RECT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rectal temperature."}]},{"code":"188424","display":"MDC_TEMP_ORAL","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Oral temperature."}]},{"code":"188428","display":"MDC_TEMP_EAR","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Ear temperature."}]},{"code":"188452","display":"MDC_TEMP_AXILLA","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Axillary (armpit) temperature."}]},{"code":"188456","display":"MDC_TEMP_GIT","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Gastro-intestinal actual height of the patient."}]},{"code":"153856","display":"MDC_CIRCUM_HEAD","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Circumference of the head."}]},{"code":"188736","display":"MDC_MASS_BODY_ACTUAL","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"The measurement of the mass of of the blood, obtained [measured by sleep apnoea breathing therapy equipment]"}]},{"code":"149514","display":"MDC_PULS_RATE","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate of blood pulse in an artery."}]},{"code":"149522","display":"MDC_BLD_PULS_RATE_INV","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Rate [using pulse oximetry]"}]},{"code":"150364","display":"MDC_TEMP_BODY","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Body temperature. temperature."}]},{"code":"150388","display":"MDC_TEMP_SKIN","designation":[{"use":{"system":"http://snomed.info/sct","version":"http://snomed.info/sct/554471000005108","code":"900000000000003001"},"value":"Skin actual height of the measurement of the mass of individual's body weight, in kilograms, divided by the square of height, in of the blood, obtained of the blood, obtained noninvasively, as computed by averaging on one cycle."}]}]}]}}}]}
